name: FSIL_OnNumberOfOpenFilesChanged
title: FSIL_OnNumberOfOpenFilesChanged
syntax: void FSIL_OnNumberOfOpenFilesChanged( dword clientAddress, dword numberOfOpenFiles)
description: Is called from the FS IL if a client has opened or closed a file or directory.

parameters.name: clientAddress
parameters.description: Address of the File Server client which has opened or closed a file or directory.
